name: ars-codex-ads
description: ARS-Codex is the Codex-native sibling of Academic Research Skills for deep research, academic writing, manuscript review, research pipelines, and experiment planning, with native support for SAO/NASA ADS.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native research, writing, review, and experiment workflows, with native support for SAO/NASA ADS.
interface.longDescription: ARS-Codex is the Codex-native sibling of Academic Research Skills. It supports Socratic research scoping, literature and systematic reviews, IMRaD paper planning and drafting, manuscript revision coaching, peer-review simulation, citation and integrity checks, experiment planning, and staged research-to-paper workflows, with native support for SAO/NASA ADS.
defaultPrompt: Plan my academic paper from rough research notes.
Review my manuscript like a journal reviewer.
Build a literature review and identify research gaps.
